name: Paracetamol
description: It is used to treat mild to moderate pain (from headaches, menstrual periods, toothaches, backaches, osteoarthritis, or cold/flu aches and pains) and to reduce fever.
precautions: Do not exceed the recommended dose. Avoid alcohol while taking this medication. Consult a doctor with severe liver issues.

name: Amoxil
description: A penicillin antibiotic used to treat many different types of infection caused by bacteria, such as tonsillitis, bronchitis, pneumonia, and infections of the ear, nose, throat, skin, or urinary tract.
precautions: Do not use if you are allergic to amoxicillin or to any other penicillin antibiotic. Finish the entire course of medication.

name: Lipitor
description: Reduces levels of bad cholesterol (low-density lipoprotein, or LDL) and triglycerides in the blood, while increasing levels of good cholesterol.
precautions: Do not use if pregnant or nursing. Advise doctor of any muscle pain immediately. Avoid grapefruit juice.
